items.name_en: 2025 Spring/Summer Collection Gucci 73 Series draws inspiration from a vintage bucket bag released in the same year as the collection name. This bag interprets the horsebit motif with modern aesthetics. It can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried as a handbag. Model 833665, Calfskin, Mini size: 18.5x20x8.5

items.name_cn:
22 Bag New Color Small Caramel
Original factory box calfskin👍Fine and lustrous leather,
soft and wear-resistant at the same time
Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments that elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of vintage sentiment, a loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Dimensions: 35*37*7cm

19 bag tote shopping bag [Color][Color]
19 SHOPPING BAG 22b is a popular tote shopping bag with amazing capacity [Strong][Strong]. It follows a classic minimalist style, and the real item is very classic and durable. It is also relatively light, made of imported soft lambskin with a great touch.

Dimensions: 30*37*10cm
